idea.title: Cargo Cult Vote
idea.hook: A small tribe must choose what to copy from a passing freighter — drag 5 ritual chips between Useful/Useless/Sacred bins each generation, but the freighter's cargo evolves.
idea.prototype: Top-down village (4x4 grid) with central altar. Each turn (= generation), a freighter drops 7 cargo silhouettes (radio, oil drum, pallet, antenna, etc). Player drags 5 chips to bins: USEFUL (boosts village production), USELESS (discarded), SACRED (altar bonus, but locks future bin from that category). Village resolves: food/morale/heat bars tick. Cargo evolves based on prior choices.
idea.mutation_of: Mutation of Yandex 'Кейс-батл' + 'Геополия: Цивилизации' + adjacent to incremental ritual themes from r/incremental_games.
idea.why_novel: Self-modifying drop pool driven by player taxonomy choices is uncommon. Cargo-cult anthropological theme is fresh on every portal.
idea.non_timer_pressure: Chip budget per generation + locked sacred categories + village stat bars
idea.lose_condition: Village morale drops to zero from sustained mis-categorisation across 3 generations.

sources.title: Ritual / cargo-cult adjacent themes
sources.snippet: Anthropological ritual incremental games appear novel

synthesizer_brief: Daily-mix ctr_experiment slot for 2026-05-22 — execution 100, leans aggressively into meme_ip_bait CTR archetype for clickability.

alternatives.title: Facade Foreman
alternatives.hook: Layer facade chips before the camera car.
